stories.title: James Outman, Dillion Dingler lift surging Tigers to 4-3 win over Royals
stories.summary: James Outman’s three-run homer in the seventh inning and Dillon Dingler’s go-ahead RBI double in the eighth led the Detroit Tigers to a 4-3 win over the Kansas City Royals on Thursday night. The Tigers improved to 50-54, keeping their playoff hopes alive as the trade deadline approaches. Detroit starter Troy Melton allowed two runs over five innings in the victory.

stories.title: Rapper YG Detained as Cops Execute Search Warrant Over Drakeo the Ruler Murder
stories.summary: Rapper YG was detained by police in Burbank, California, as they executed a search warrant related to the 2021 murder investigation of Drakeo the Ruler, with whom YG had a public feud despite denying involvement in the crime. The search warrant was served by the California Highway Patrol and the Burbank Police Department's SWAT team, but YG was released without being arrested. YG is scheduled to perform in a rap battle series, VERZUZ, later that evening, despite the morning's unexpected encounter with law enforcement.

stories.title: Satellite spots a 'hummingbird' in Antarctica photo of the day for July 23, 2026
stories.summary: A stunning satellite image captured by NISAR has revealed a unique feature resembling a hummingbird in Antarctica, but it's actually a mountaintop with crevasses and a stream of ice flowing northeast towards the ocean. The image shows Nunatak Zaterjavshijsja, a mountaintop in East Antarctica, with the dark belly of the "bird" being the mountain's surface and the "feathers" being crevasses formed by a glacier. This detailed view was made possible by NISAR's sophisticated radar instruments, which will continue to provide valuable data for researchers and users worldwide.

stories.title: YG and The Game's 'VERZUZ': Travis Barker Pops Out for Opening Cut "Dope Boys"
stories.summary: Travis Barker joined YG and The Game’s VERZUZ livestream on July 23, drumming live during The Game’s opening performance of “Dope Boys.” The surprise appearance capped off a high-energy start to the Compton rappers’ long-awaited clash. The event is available to watch on Apple Music and YouTube.

stories.title: Burnham to spend first day working from northern branch of No 10
stories.summary: Mayor Andy Burnham will chair the National Economic Council in Manchester this Friday to mark the opening of the new Downing Street northern branch. This office aims to decentralize government power by moving key decision-making away from London and toward regional leaders. Up to 300 civil servants are expected to relocate to the site by the end of next year to support local economic growth.

stories.title: US imposes tariffs on dozens of trade partners over 'forced labour' imports
stories.summary: The US is imposing tariffs ranging from 10% to 12.5% on around 60 trading partners, including the UK, China, EU, Canada, Japan, and India, over claims they failed to properly stop forced labour imports. The new duties will take effect on Friday, replacing a temporary 10% tax on foreign goods that expired earlier this year. This move marks the latest escalation in the global trade war, as the US seeks to address human rights abuses and distortive trade practices.

stories.title: Creepy Twins, Religious Fanaticism and a Loaded Gun Collide in Tense Chamber Drama ‘Godhead’ — Fantasia
stories.summary: A new chamber drama titled Godhead premiered at Montreal’s Fantasia Festival, blending faith, sex, and tension in black-and-white. A rural priest is visited by two bizarre twins who claim to be part of a prophecy and arrive with a gun. Director Mark H. Rapaport, whose debut Hippo also premiered at Fantasia, explores crooked authority and leaves audiences with challenging questions.

stories.title: YG vs. The Game: VERZUZ — Compton Forever
stories.summary: Rappers YG and The Game faced off in a VERZUZ battle on July 23, with YG delivering 12 songs, including hits like "Toxic" and "Godzilla," while The Game performed 10 tracks, including "Hate It or Love It" and "My Life." The event, which celebrated the artists' impact on hip-hop culture, featured live voting from fans, with results reflecting their real-time participation. The outcome of the battle remains unofficial, as the votes were cast to represent the fans' opinions rather than an official declaration of victory or defeat.

stories.title: Curiosity Blog, Sols 4954–4960: Celebrating Our Rover Engineers Past and Present
stories.summary: NASA’s Curiosity rover completed its latest science operations on Mars, analyzing five rock targets with its APXS instrument and MAHLI imager. Engineers successfully deployed the robotic arm despite dusty, uneven terrain by brushing surfaces and selecting safe contact points. The team now plans to continue exploring the area while celebrating the engineers behind the rover’s ongoing mission.

stories.title: Week 8: Edmonton Elks at Saskatchewan Roughriders
stories.summary: The Edmonton Elks are set to face the Saskatchewan Roughriders in Week 8 of the 2026 Canadian Football League season, with kickoff scheduled for 9:00 pm ET. This matchup is available to international audiences on CFL+, while Canadian viewers can watch on TSN or RDS2, and U.S. audiences on CBS Sports. The game marks a key contest in the league's ongoing season.

stories.title: ‘Stuart Fails to Save the Universe’ Co-Creator Bill Prady Explains the Science Behind the Show’s Multiverse
stories.summary: Bill Prady, co-creator of Stuart Fails to Save the Universe, explains the show’s multiverse chaos in the series premiere now streaming on HBO Max. The post-apocalyptic Pasadena setting features zombie hands, giant moths and reality-tearing portals, while a second Stuart arrives to warn that The Big Bang Theory characters caused the disaster. Regular Stuart and Bert must track down a quantum device at Caltech to restore order.

stories.title: Heatwave anxiety can make you feel 'incredibly helpless' - here's how to manage it
stories.summary: A record June heatwave in England, with temperatures above 30C in some homes, has left parents like 36-year-old Tavia Watts feeling "incredibly helpless" over their children's safety. Watts, a stay-at-home mum in Cheltenham, shared her climate anxiety online, receiving 18,000 likes and sparking wider discussion. A 2022 University of Bath study estimates 4.6% of UK adults experience climate-related distress, particularly young people and women.

stories.title: Trump Administration to Impose New Tariffs of Around 10% on Over 80 Nations
stories.summary: The administration announced new duties tied to countries’ imports of goods made with forced labor, replacing a global 10 percent tariff set to expire at midnight.

stories.title: Indonesian babies were trafficked to Singapore. What happens to them now?
stories.summary: Indonesian babies trafficked to Singapore for adoption have left adoptive parents in limbo after a court convicted 19 people for the crime. At least 12 babies were sent to Singapore as part of a syndicate that procured 34 children. Authorities in both countries now face urgent decisions on the children’s future.

stories.title: China's Moonshot AI stole from Anthropic, Trump tech adviser says
stories.summary: A White House adviser has accused China's Moonshot AI of stealing capabilities from US firm Anthropic through a large-scale distillation campaign to develop its Kimi K3 model. Michael Kratsios claimed Moonshot accessed restricted Nvidia servers, including advanced GB300 chips, despite 2022 export controls, raising concerns over AI technology gaps. The allegations highlight escalating tensions in the global AI race as US officials warn of strategic risks from foreign competitors.

stories.title: US health panel recommends easing restrictions on controversial peptides
stories.summary: A federal health advisory panel narrowly voted to ease restrictions on several peptides, including BPC-157 and TB-500, despite warnings from government scientists that the compounds lack proof of safety or effectiveness. The 8-6 decision, with one abstention, would allow pharmacies to compound injectable versions of the substances. If the FDA follows the recommendation, telehealth companies are expected to significantly expand marketing of the peptides for wellness and cosmetic use.

stories.title: What to Know About Peptides the FDA Is Considering for Use
stories.summary: The agency is considering whether compounding pharmacies should be allowed to produce BPC-157, TB-500 and other previously banned peptides.

stories.title: Judge Extends Pause for Paramount-Warner Bros. Deal
stories.summary: The court blocked the companies from closing the acquisition through mid-August, as a judge considers two lawsuits challenging it.

stories.title: King's Tardis entrance as Commonwealth Games begin
stories.summary: The Commonwealth Games opening ceremony in Glasgow featured a parade of nations that drew loud cheers for the Falkland Islands and Samoa, but the loudest reception greeted the Scotland team, who entered last in kilts to bagpipes and a rendition of Flower of Scotland. The event, held indoors before about 10,000 spectators, included theatrical performances celebrating Glasgow and the Commonwealth, with Scottish singer Nathan Evans and a dance under a replica of Glasgow Central Station's clock.

stories.title: Hull KR inflict more derby misery on Hull FC
stories.summary: Out-of-form Super League champions Hull KR put a stop to their losing run as they battle back to beat city rivals Hull FC in a feisty derby. Betfred Super League Hull FC (12) 20 Tries: Batchelor, D Litten, Arthur Goals: Hardaker 4 Hull KR (12) 28 Tries: Amone, Mourgue, Broadbent, Burgess, Dezaria Goals: Mourgue 7 Out-of-form Super League champions Hull KR put a stop to their losing run as they battled back to beat city rivals Hull FC in a feisty derby.

stories.title: Number of U.S. Troop Deaths in Iran War Appears Lower on Pentagon Website
stories.summary: Three military officials and a Pentagon spokesman gave conflicting explanations for why the number of Americans killed in the Iran war had changed.

stories.title: FDA Panel Supports Lifting Restrictions on Four Peptides
stories.summary: In an all-day hearing, the agency’s scientists argued against allowing broad access to unproven drugs that the agency had banned three years ago.

stories.title: Amid Cyclospora Outbreak Tied to Lettuce, America Skips Salads
stories.summary: Foot traffic to chains such as Chopt and Chipotle fell in recent weeks after a recall from Taylor Farms and changing messages from the F.D.A.

stories.title: Health Care Agency Discontinues Dozens of Active Research Awards
stories.summary: The Agency for Healthcare Research and Quality slowed the awarding of new grants last year. Now it is stopping existing ones.

stories.title: Intel Benefits From a New Shift in A.I. Spending
stories.summary: The Silicon Valley chipmaker’s revenue rose 25 percent in the latest quarter, its fastest growth in 15 years, as A.I. firms increasingly bought chips known as central processing units.

stories.title: Key Republican Senator Says He Will Support Erica Schwartz for C.D.C. Director
stories.summary: Senator Bill Cassidy, who is believed to hold the deciding vote in the Senate health committee for Dr. Erica Schwartz’s confirmation, had declined for days to say whether he would back her.
